posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Meet June’s New Features.

Join our monthly roundup of all the latest releases!

This 1 hour webinar includes:
30-40 mins - Demonstration of new releases
20-30 mins - Q&A

This webinar will be focusing on more advanced aspects of the monday.com platform and is therefore not recommended for absolute beginners. For more info about our new releases and whats gradually being released check out our monthly new features newsletter.
